name: Seafood Botticellli (3 Graces)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Crawfish tails or 1 pound Scallops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, melt butter over medium heat.
2. Gradually add flour, stirring until the mixture is light brown and smooth.
3. Reduce heat to low and add chopped onions, celery, scallions, and garlic. Stir in seasonings.
4. Simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add sour cream, heavy cream, seafood stock, and white wine. Return to a simmer and cook for 10-15 minutes.
6. Drain the oysters or scallops but do not rinse them.
7. Gently add the oysters, crawfish tails (or scallops), shrimp, and mushrooms to the pot. Add salt to taste.
8. Simmer for an additional 10 minutes until seafood is cooked through.
9. Serve over pasta or rice.
